specs.materials: Flexible polypropylene mid-back, upholstered seat (fabric, vinyl, or leather), fiberglass reinforced nylon arms and armcaps, steel frame
key_features: Flexible polypropylene mid-back (Flex Response Back Support)
Nesting creep of 10 in (254 mm) per chair
Swiveling dual-wheel casters on each leg
Fixed fiberglass reinforced nylon arms with soft-touch coating
specs.notes: Model 1900 is the Flexible Polypropylene Medium Back Nesting Chair with Arms variant in the Roma series. Other series model numbers (1898 honeycomb back, 1899 mesh back w/ arms, 1901 mesh armless, 1902 polypropylene armless) are included in model_codes for reference but 1900 is the subject product. Dimensions confirmed across multiple dealer pages; weight sourced from Amazon listing for the series. No specific certifications (BIFMA/GREENGUARD) surfaced on the pages loaded, though Global typically certifies this line — leaving empty rather than fabricating.
